Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare FFS Claims (version L) Codebook │ May 2026 │ V 1.15 
282 
PRF_PHYSN_NPI 
LABEL: 
Carrier Line Performing NPI Number 
DESCRIPTION: The National Provider Identifier (NPI) assigned to the performing provider. 
SHORT NAME: PRFNPI 
LONG NAME: PRF_PHYSN_NPI 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
12 
SOURCE: 
NCH 
VALUES: 
— 
COMMENT: 
Effective May 2007, the NPI became the national standard identifier for covered health care providers. 
NPIs
